name: BeenVerified

optOut.leaveItGuidance: BeenVerified aggregates name history and relatives. If the former-name link isn't already present, the opt-out search itself surfaces it.
steps: Search for your record on the opt-out page.
Select your listing from the results.
Provide an email to receive the verification link.
Click the verification link to complete the removal.

notes: Shares a data backbone with several sibling people-search sites; re-check related brokers too.
attribution: Derived from Big-Ass Data Broker Opt-Out List (CC BY-NC-SA).
